channel.title: h4cc/awesome-elixir Daily Updates RSS Feed
channel.description: Track daily updates of more than 500 awesome projects, including selfhosted, rust, javascript, swift, python, react, vue, free for dev, flutter, go etc.

item.title: h4cc/awesome-elixir Sep 21st, 2022
item.description:
HTTP

  • Mechanizestars26 - Build web scrapers and automate interaction with websites in Elixir with ease!

item.title: h4cc/awesome-elixir Sep 19th, 2022
item.description:
Images

  • thumbor_clientstars4 - Client for Thumbor.

    • Testing

  • propcheckstars322 - Property based testing for Elixir.
  • dummystars0 - An Elixir mocking library that makes sense by exposing meck in the right way

    • Miscellaneous

  • cubdbstars375 - CubDB is an embedded key-value database, written in the Elixir language. It runs locally, it is schema-less, and backed by a single file.
  • quarantinestars2 - Quarantine is a tiny OTP application for feature toggles.

    • ORM and Datamapping

  • ecto_liststars17 - Simple ordered model management with Ecto.

    • Instrumenting / Monitoring

  • app_optexstars5 - Client for AppOptics API. Send metrics and tags to AppOptics time series service.

    • Algorithms and Data structures

  • clopestars18 - Elixir implementation of CLOPE: A Fast and Effective Clustering Algorithm for Transactional Data.
  • Closure Tablestars21 - Closure Table for Elixir - a simple solution for storing and manipulating complex hierarchies. It provides in-memory and Ecto adapters.
  • graphexstars7 - A library for composing and executing task graphs in elixir. Docs

    • HTML

  • meseeksstars281 - A library for parsing and extracting data from HTML and XML with CSS or XPath selectors.

    • Actors

  • ex_lttbstars21 - An Elixir downsampling library that retains the visual characteristics of your data.

    • Configuration

  • weave - JIT configuration loader that works with Kubernetes and Docker Swarm.

    • Utilities

  • sitemapperstars28 - A fast, stream based XML Sitemap generator.
  • plugmapstars3 - Plugmap is sitemap generation library for Plug/Phoenix Framework. Doc

    • Podcasts

  • Elixir Fountain
  • Elixir Mix
  • Elixir Outlaws
  • Elixir Talk

    • Geolocation

  • srtmstars4 - Query locations for elevation data from the NASA Shuttle Radar Topography Mission.

    • Errors and Exception Handling

  • AppSignal Elixirstars238 - The official AppSignal package for Elixir.

    • Books

  • Elixir Succinctly - A short book to learn the basic of Elixir and its ecosystem.
  • Études for Elixir - A collection of exercises to program in Elixir by J. David Eisenberg (2013) (Github Repostars514).

    • Applications

  • Caddishousestars2 - A web-based document reader that connects to your cloud storage accounts using Phoenix/LiveView.

    • Audio and Sounds

  • ex_alsastars2 - Elixir ALSA bindings
  • ex_jackstars3 - Elixir JACK bindings

item.title: h4cc/awesome-elixir Sep 18th, 2022
item.description:
Games

  • Rovexstars7 - An implementation of the Mars Rover kata in Elixir transformed in a basic multiplayer game.
  • pictionarystars15 - A multiplayer guessing and drawing game (skribbl.io clone).
  • rayexstars9 - Raylib bindings to Elixir for games programming.

    • Websites

  • ElixirLibs - A curated list of Elixir libraries
  • Elixir Online Courses list - Classpert - A list of Elixir Online Courses (some are free) from Classpert Online Course Search

    • Third Party APIs

  • nachastars13 - Elixir library for generating and parsing NACHA files for US ACH transfers.

    • Networking

  • sisestars0 - A simple to use SSDP client.

    • Instrumenting / Monitoring

  • prom_exstars428 - Prometheus metrics and Grafana dashboards for all of your favorite Elixir libraries.

    • Screencasts

  • Curso de Elixir de 0 a 100 - Complete course of elixir (in spanish) for free.
  • Kamil Skowron - YouTube channel dedicated to promote functional programming, publishing "real world" programming videos in Elixir like "Hands-on Elixir & OTP: Cryptocurrency trading bot" series.

    • Testing

  • toxiproxy_exstars40 - API client for the resilience testing tool Toxiproxy.
  • patchstars84 - Ergonomic Mocking for Elixir.

    • HTTP

  • SpiderManstars9 - A base-on Broadway fast high-level web crawling & scraping framework for Elixir.

    • Miscellaneous

  • indicadostars20 - Technical indicator library for Elixir with no dependencies.

    • Macros

  • typed_structstars620 - An Elixir library for defining structs with a type without writing boilerplate code.

    • Release Management

  • versiocestars16 - An extensible version bumping and changelog generation for your mix project

    • Debugging

  • inspectorstars14 - A simple one-line module that allows a more friendly debugging experience.

    • QUIC

  • quicerstars119 - QUIC protocol erlang library.

    • Applications

  • Igthornstars90 - Cryptocurrecy trading platform / trading bot with admin panel.

    • Translations and Internationalizations

  • free PO editor - A tool for translating PO files.

    • Actors

  • alfstars108 - Flow-based Application Layer Framework.

    • Code Analysis

  • int_setstars8 - A time- and memory-efficient unordered data structure for positive integers.

    • Benchmarking

  • beamchmarkstars73 - A Tool for measuring EVM performance.

    • Queue

  • faktory_workerstars32 - An Elixir library for working with Faktory, a polyglot job processing system made by the author of Sidekiq.

    • Algorithms and Data structures

  • conrexstars52 - An Elixir implementation of the CONREC algorithm for topographic or isochrone maps.

    • Search

  • elasticlunrstars149 - A small, full-text search library for use in the Elixir environment.

    • Text and Numbers

  • transformerstars0 - Flexible type conversion lightweight library.

item.title: h4cc/awesome-elixir Sep 15th, 2022
item.description:
Networking

  • Firezonestars2.9k - Open-source VPN server and egress firewall for Linux built on WireGuard. Firezone is easy to set up (all dependencies are bundled thanks to Chef Omnibus), secure, performant, and self hostable.

    • Cryptography

  • nimble_totpstars279 - Allows implementation of Time-based One-Time Passwords (TOTP) for 2FA.

    • JSON

  • jsoncstars0 - Utilities for working with jsonc, a superset of json.

    • Configuration

  • enuxstars2 - utility package for loading, validating and documenting your app's configuration variables from env, json and jsonc files at runtime and injecting them into your environment.
  • skogsrastars95 - Library to manage OS environment variables and application configuration options with ease

    • Files and Directories

  • ivcustars3 - File Validator, Converter, and Uploader.

    • Protocols

  • borshstars2 - Elixir implementation of the BORSH binary serializer.

    • Text and Numbers

  • near_apistars9 - A NEAR API in Elixir - a library for DApps development on the NEAR blockchain platform.

    • Artificial Intelligence

  • m2cgenstars2.2k - A CLI tool to transpile trained classic ML models into a native Elixir code with zero dependencies.

    • Algorithms and Data structures

  • ajastars103 - High performance persistent vectors and ordered maps.

    • Screencasts

  • Elixir Foundation - Learn Elixir by building a practical example. Learn how GenServer, Agents and many other elixir primitives work.

item.title: h4cc/awesome-elixir May 19th, 2020
item.description:
Applications

  • workbenchstars96 - From Idea to Execution - Manage your trading operation across a globally distributed cluster.
  • Taistars399 - A composable, real time, cryptocurrency market data and trade execution toolkit.

    • Macros

  • pathexstars242 - Zero-dependency, blazing fast functional lenses.

    • PDF

  • chromic_pdfstars204 - A client for Chrome's DevTools API to generate PDFs (HTML to PDF).
  • pdf_generatorstars289 - A simple wrapper for wkhtmltopdf or puppeteer (HTML to PDF) for use in Elixir projects.
  • puppeteer_pdfstars88 - Another wrapper around puppeteer (HTML to PDF) for use in Elixir projects.

    • Email

  • swooshstars1.2k - Compose, deliver and test your Emails (with attachments!) easily in Elixir with adapters for SMTP, Sendgrid, Mandrill, Mailgun, Postmark and lots others, plus Phoenix integration with mailbox preview.

    • Lexical analysis

  • abnf_parsecstars41 - ABNF in and parser out.

    • Framework Components

  • recaptchastars104 - A simple reCaptcha 2 library for Elixir applications.

    • ORM and Datamapping

  • barrel_exstars0 - Barrel-db distributed document-oriented database REST client in Elixir.

    • Networking

  • hadesstars23 - A wrapper for NMAP written in Elixir.

    • Queue

  • flumestars35 - A blazing fast job processing system backed by GenStage & Redis.

    • Instrumenting / Monitoring

  • wobserverstars924 - Web based metrics, monitoring, and observer.

    • Authentication

  • elixir_auth_googlestars114 - The simplest way to add Google OAuth authentication ("Sign in with Google") to your Elixir/Phoenix app.

item.title: h4cc/awesome-elixir Oct 6th, 2019
item.description:
Miscellaneous

  • AlloyCIstars289 - AlloyCI is a Continuous Integration, Deployment, and Delivery coordinator, written in Elixir, that takes advantage of the GitLab CI Runner, and its capabilities as executor, to prepare and run your pipelines.
  • Jisho-Elixirstars25 - An API wrapper for Jisho.org, an online Japanese dictionary. Allows users to search by word, symbol, and or tags (refer to docs).
  • epub_cover_extractorstars5 - Extract cover from EPUB files.

    • Static Page Generation

  • medusastars3 - Elixir static site generator that supports Pug.

    • Third Party APIs

  • conektastars15 - Elixir wrapper for Conekta API.

    • Applications

  • CaptainFactstars177 - A collaborative, real-time video fact-checking platform. (Docs).
  • Exonstars21 - A “mess manager” developed in Elixir and provides a simple API to manage & document your stuff. (Docs).
  • medusa_serverstars7 - A simple cowboy web server written in Elixir to stack images. (Docs).

    • Artificial Intelligence

  • Exnnstars95 - Evolutive Neural Networks framework à la G.Sher written in Elixir. (Docs).
  • Neat-Ex - An Elixir implementation of the NEAT algorithm. (Docs).

    • Authentication

  • coherencestars1.2k - Coherence is a full featured, configurable authentication system for Phoenix. (Docs).
  • guardianstars3.2k - An authentication framework for use with Elixir applications. (Docs).

    • Authorization

  • canarystars463 - An authorization library for Elixir applications that restricts what resources the current user is allowed to access. (Docs).
  • terminatorstars57 - Database based authorization (ACL), with custom DSL rules for requiring needed permissions. (Docs).

    • Chatting

  • hedwigstars638 - XMPP Client/Bot Framework for Elixir.(Docs).
  • ExGramstars137 - a library to build Telegram Bots, you can use the low-level methods and models or use the really opinionated framework included. (Docs).

    • Cloud Infrastructure and Management

  • erlcloudstars645 - Cloud Computing library for Erlang (Amazon EC2, S3, SQS, SimpleDB, Mechanical Turk, ELB). (Docs).
  • libclusterstars1.6k - Automatic cluster formation/healing for Elixir applications.(Docs).

    • Code Analysis

  • credostars4.5k - A static code analysis tool with a focus on code consistency and teaching Elixir. (Docs).
  • dialyxirstars1.5k - Mix tasks to simplify use of Dialyzer in Elixir projects.(Docs).
  • dogmastars473 - A code style linter for Elixir, powered by shame.(Docs).

    • Cryptography

  • cloakstars506 - Cloak makes it easy to use encryption with Ecto.(Docs).
  • comeoninstars1.2k - Password hashing (argon2, bcrypt, pbkdf2_sha512) library for Elixir.(https://hexdocs.pm/comeonin/api-reference.html).
  • ex_cryptostars124 - Elixir wrapper for Erlang crypto and public_key modules. Provides sensible defaults for many crypto functions to make them easier to use.(Docs).

    • Framework Components

  • access passstars72 - Authentication framework that can be used with or outside of phoenix. Similar to Addict but geared towards API usage.(Docs).

    • Date and Time

  • quantumstars2k - Cron-like job scheduler for Elixir applications.
